question_text: What is the wavelength of a wave?

options.label: A
options.text: The time taken for one complete oscillation

options.label: B
options.text: The distance between two consecutive points that are in phase, such as crest to crest

options.label: C
options.text: The speed at which the wave is moving

options.label: D
options.text: The height of the wave from the bottom to the top

explanation: Wavelength is the distance from one repeating point on a wave to the next identical point—commonly measured from crest to crest or trough to trough. It tells us how spread out the wave is.
